text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Pacific is UTC - 8, Asia/Tokyo is UTC + 9, so the time difference is 9 - (-8)=17 hours.
2. Add the time difference to 11:00 AM (11:00): 11:00 + 17:00 = 28:00.
3. Adjust for the 24 - hour cycle: 28:00 - 24:00 = 04:00, and the date advances to August 20, 1489.
FINAL_ANSWER: 04:00 on August 20, 1489
